author: xrs_01
content: https://ethresear.ch/t/delegated-execution-sharding-des-a-hyper-parallelized-zkevm-for-theoretically-optimal-execution-layer-scalability/24724 I wrote an ethresearch post about what I call Delegated Execution Sharding (DES) if it may interest anybody. TLDR I think that zkEVM parallelism on the layer 1 is both feasible and desirable, and the architecture proposed involves recursive SNARK aggregation of valid execution proofs computed by 'execution committees' running the STF on disjointed (can be parallelized) segments of a block.

author: xrs_01
content: It means EVM throughput that scales with the validator set, similarly to how attestations on the Beacon chain expand with the number of validators.
